title: Blast-tinting
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Blast-tinting''' was a mechanism used in some [[Starship/Legends|starship]] cockpits that tinted the viewports according to the amount of light outside, preventing the occupants from being blinded by explosions.

{{Tech-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]''
*''[[Dark Nest III: The Swarm War]]''

[[Category:Safety devices]]
